objective: Fix restore button width and update operation status to reflect 'Restore complete' after manual restore.
design_decisions: Used flex: 1 and minWidth: 0 on text column, fixed width 120px with flexShrink: 0 on Restore button in BackupBrowserModal.
Refetched game history after runSnapshotRestore and runForceOperation, then stored via ludusaviStore.setGameHistory to correctly update last operation text.
results: All tests passed. Reviewer granted PASS. Merged to dev and dispatched dev release.
